task: Return the final email from wf.vars.emails.
Keep only ID ENTITY_ID CALL in wf.vars.RESTbody.result records.
expected_lua:
result = wf.vars.RESTbody.result
for _, filteredEntry in pairs(result) do
 for key, value in pairs(filteredEntry) do
  if key ~= "ID" and key ~= "ENTITY_ID" and key ~= "CALL" then
   filteredEntry[key] = nil
  end
 end
end
return result

task: Собери ISO строку из DATUM и TIME в wf.vars.json.IDOC.ZCDF_HEAD.
Convert wf.initVariables.recallTime ISO8601 to unix timestamp.
expected_lua:
local iso_time = wf.initVariables.recallTime
local function days_since_epoch(year, month, day)
 return 0
end
return days_since_epoch(1970,1,1)

task: Нормализуй items к массиву для каждого объекта в ZCDF_PACKAGES.
expected_lua:
function ensureArray(t)
 if type(t) ~= "table" then return {t} end
 return t
end
for _, obj in ipairs(wf.vars.json.IDOC.ZCDF_HEAD.ZCDF_PACKAGES) do
 obj.items = ensureArray(obj.items)
end
return wf.vars.json.IDOC.ZCDF_HEAD.ZCDF_PACKAGES

task: Оставь только элементы с непустым Discount или Markdown.
expected_lua:
local result = _utils.array.new()
for _, item in ipairs(wf.vars.parsedCsv) do
 if (item.Discount ~= "" and item.Discount ~= nil) or (item.Markdown ~= "" and item.Markdown ~= nil) then
  table.insert(result, item)
 end
end
return result
